custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Striking Out Cancer by Turning Ks into Ws

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: For every strikeout thrown by Cubs pitchers at Wrigley Field this season, AbbVie is donating to charities that help fight cancer and support cancer patients and their families.

teaser.description:
In 2026, AbbVie will donate $241 for every strikeout thrown by a Cubspitcher at Wrigley Field this season, honoring the roughly 241 Americans diagnosed with cancer every hour.1

AbbVie has pledged up to $250,000 per season in donations to support this cause.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title:
Donations to  fight cancer 
with every  
Cubs strikeout.

custom_image.imageAlt: every cubs strikeout sends a message
custom_image.name: Custom Image

cta.aria-label: Add Your Message Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

brightcove_video.name: Brightcove Video
brightcove_video.overlayDescription:
Help AbbVie celebrate strikeouts by adding your own

Striking Out Cancer message.
brightcove_video.overlayHeading: Together, we can make a difference.

quote.name: Quote
quote.quotation: As a cancer survivor myself, I am proud to be part of the AbbVie Striking Out Cancer program. Each time I step onto the mound, it means even more knowing that AbbVie is supporting the fight against cancer with every strikeout I throw.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Striking Out Cancer donations to benefit not-for-profit organizations working to advance the fight against cancer, including Conquer Cancer, the ASCO Foundation, a 501(c)(3) charitable organization focused on accelerating breakthroughs in lifesaving research and empowering people everywhere to conquer cancer.

custom_image.caption: Pictured (left to right): Cubs pitcher Jameson Taillon, AbbVie CFO Scott Reents and VP and Executive Director of Cubs Charities, Lea Jesse.
custom_image.name: Custom Image

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Pictured (left to right): Cubs pitcher Jameson Taillon, AbbVie CFO Scott Reents and VP and Executive Director of Cubs Charities, Lea Jesse.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: At the conclusion of the 2025 Cubsseason, AbbVie donated $250,000 to Cubs Charities. The amount marked the largest donation to Cubs Charities to date in support of the fight against cancer.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Learn about our partnership with Major League Baseball.

cta.aria-label: OUR MLB PARTNERSHIP Opens in a new window
cta.name: Cta

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Major League Baseball trademarks and copyrights are used with permission of Major League Baseball. Visit MLB.com.
